# ANALYSIS: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GYM_VALIDATOR

**Filed:** 2026-05-21
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** gym_validator

## Summary

Created a gym validator that enforces the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE rule (reject bull v14e branch) and ran it against the existing 65/65 gym suite to verify no regressions.

## Result

The gym validator passed all 65 tests in the gym suite, confirming no regressions introduced by the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE rule.

## Details

The V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE rule is a watcher quality gate that excludes the bull v14e branch. The gym validator checks that the engine does not take any bull v14e branch trades when the gate is active.

The existing 65/65 gym suite includes a variety of market conditions and edge cases. All tests passed, indicating that the rule is correctly implemented and does not cause unintended side effects on the engine's behavior for non-bull v14e scenarios.

## Conclusion

No regressions detected. The V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE rule is ready for promotion pending other OP-21 criteria.

## Confidence

9 / 10 -- Based on the gym suite pass and the watcher analysis showing the bull branch is pure drag.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not change any strategy candidate. It validates the existing V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE candidate (rank 3) which is currently NEEDS-MORE-DATA awaiting OP-21 criteria.
